# E03 Song ASR Regression Fixture

This fixture documents the saved ASR material used by
`song_subtitle_timeline_service_test.dart`.

Real full diagnostic snapshot kept in this fixture set:

`e03_song_asr_full_20260622_233253.json`

Runtime source diagnostic snapshot:

`F:\TomatoEnglishHappyTalking\release\windows\tomato_english_happy_talking\diagnostics\song-asr-article-48-suno_48_1781965573729_1-20260622-220431.json`

The original `20260622-220431` runtime file was not recoverable after release
rebuild cleanup, so `e03_song_asr_full_20260622_233253.json` was generated by
submitting the same E03 song audio through the real ASR diagnostic bridge.

The regression cases keep the full ASR snapshot plus compact word-timing
excerpts in `e03_song_asr_regression_words.json`. The Dart tests read the
fixture files directly so the unit tests are stable without needing the local
release directory. Keep these scenarios as required checks when changing lyric
matching:

- E03 line 49/50: ASR contains full word timings for `she looked up...overhead`
  and `before her...passage`; line 49 must not regress to interpolated.
- E03 final line: ASR recognizes only `which was lit up by a row of lamps`;
  `hanging from the roof` is absent, so the cue must be treated as partial and
  extended by lyric length rather than ending at `lamps`.
